description: Letter to the Jewish community (qahal) of Fustat from a petitioner whose children were taken captive. The community has only redeemed some of them so far. In the margin, there is an autograph note from one of the later Maimonidean Nagids ordering the cantor to read it in public. Dating: no earlier than 13th century. (Information from Mediterranean Society, II, p. 107, and from Amir Ashur)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
